review_comment: LGTM, but in order to ease future maintenance, I would have move this block (STM32_PLL_ENABLED && CONFIG_SOC_SERIES_STM32F7X) before FLASH_ACR_LATENCY block (to avoid imbrication of both compilation switches)

Yes, 
activation of the overdrive mode depends on the sys clock freq (whatever the latency but must be done before the latency setting)
